inputs.shares_source: Aggregator / ADVFN shares outstanding 147,869,033 [HUMAN REVIEW — confirm on SEDAR annual]
inputs.cash_source: Yahoo GRZ.V total cash ~CAD 139.6M converted ~USD 100M at ~0.73; YE2025 press cited ~USD 69M before later placements [HUMAN REVIEW]
inputs.unpaid_award_source: Company H1 2025 interim Note 5 estimate as of 2026-06-30 (MarketScreener copy of IR filing; SEDAR PDF not yet local) [HUMAN REVIEW]
inputs.normalization_note: No operating free cash flow. Value is cash plus risked collection of ICSID award / Delaware attached judgment and Arb II option.

bear.notes: Amber CITGO sale closes with little net cash to Gold Reserve after senior creditors; legal spend continues; cash floor erodes; Arb II worthless near term

base.notes: Partial attached-judgment recovery plus residual cash over ~4 years (OFAC/closing/appeals path). Net after CVR 5.466% and bonus plan leakage. No Arb II value in base.

sotp_build.notes: Partial attached-judgment recovery plus residual cash over ~4 years (OFAC/closing/appeals path). Net after CVR 5.466% and bonus plan leakage. No Arb II value in base.

bull.notes: Large award/judgment cash collection (order of hundreds of millions to more than $1B face, after leakage) and/or meaningful Arb II settlement option priced in

optionality_gate.notes: Cash is a soft floor only; burn and dilution can breach it. Primary decision metric is four-year dated payoff IRR.

nav_overlay.source: Local litigation PDFs + secondary financials pending SEDAR
nav_overlay.notes: Face unpaid award ~$1.18B is not a NAV mark. Company does not book the receivable as probable. Use risked payoff scenarios only.

options.label: 2014 ICSID award / settlement collection
options.base_terminal_rationale: Risked net collection after CVR/bonus over multi-year enforcement [Assumption]
options.evidence: Lisbon recognition 2025-02-20; company unpaid estimate ~$1.18B at 2025-06-30

options.label: Delaware PDVH/CITGO sale attached judgment
options.base_terminal_rationale: Partial recovery if Amber sale closes and GR attached claim is paid from waterfall; SPA allows up to $500M Incremental Consideration use for GR attached judgment [Assumption on net to equity]

options.label: Arb II Siembra Minera claim (> $7B pleaded)
options.base_terminal_rationale: Base case $0; bull only. Rights revoked 2022; claim filed 2025-03-05; multi-year ICSID path

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Unpaid award ~$1.18B not booked as receivable; collection not probable under IFRS

option_scan.question: Dormant land / resource option?
option_scan.evidence: Siembra Minera rights revoked Mar 2022; 2018 NI 43-101 historical only

option_scan.question: Transitory legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: CITGO sale order Nov 2025; Lisbon recognition; Arb II RFA

stance_proposal.override_reason: Process risk and moat fail; optionality floor is soft cash only. Prefer watch until SEDAR + Amber closing verified.

notes: Download SEDAR/TSXV H1 2025, YE 2025, and latest interim for audited cash and share count
Confirm Final Priority Order / attached judgment dollar and rank vs Crystallex/Conoco
Track Amber sale OFAC license, closing, and any appeal of 2025-11-29 Sale Order
Do not treat \.18B face award as NAV

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.label: Corporate cash (soft floor)
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Present cash available to common after near-term legal/G&A burn; no award receivable booked.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Secondary cash ~USD 100M / 147.9M shares (~$0.68). YE2025 press cited ~USD 69M before later placements. SEDAR annual pending [HUMAN REVIEW].
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Liquidity, FX, and placement dilution bracket the range.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: SEDAR cash balance or going-concern burn shows cash floor below the low case after legal spend.

economic_ownership_map.label: Risked ICSID/CITGO net recovery
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Risked present value of net award collections only; cash remains separate.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Company H1 2025 interim Note 5 unpaid award ~$1.18bn face; Delaware attached judgment / CITGO sale path; net after CVR 5.466% and bonus-plan leakage. Base aligns with four-year dated payoff ~$7 including cash.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Base assumes ~4 years to meaningful net cash; bear embeds longer or failed closing.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Analyst judgment pending Amber closing and creditor waterfall; base embeds partial recovery over ~4 years.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining legal spend and senior claims are partly in the reserve component and partly netted in recovery.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Probability, timing, OFAC/closing, creditor ranking, CVR, and bonus plan are inside the range.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Amber sale closes with de minimis net cash to Gold Reserve after senior creditors, or OFAC/closing permanently blocks distribution.

economic_ownership_map.label: Arb II Siembra Minera option
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Incremental option only; does not double-count ICSID/CITGO recovery.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Arb II RFA pleadings claim large incremental damages; base zero until tribunal path and collectibility clearer. High case is bull-only optionality.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Multi-year arbitration timing; not in the four-year base payoff.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base success probability treated as ~0 until clearer tribunal path; high case is bull optionality.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No additional owner-funded mine capital modeled; legal spend covered in reserve/cash burn.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Base zero; high case is success-path optionality only.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Tribunal dismisses Arb II or collectibility collapses so high-case optionality is not supportable.

economic_ownership_map.label: Legal burn and senior-claim reserve
economic_ownership_map.growth_driver: Deduction for spend and priority leakage not already netted in the risked recovery line.

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Ongoing litigation spend and ranking risk versus other attached judgment creditors on CITGO proceeds.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Negative additive; does not double-count CVR already netted in recovery.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Creditor waterfall or burn rate shows a larger structural haircut than the low case.

facts.label: Risked ICSID/CITGO net recovery
facts.evidence: Company H1 2025 interim Note 5 unpaid award ~$1.18bn face; Delaware attached judgment / CITGO sale path; net after CVR 5.466% and bonus-plan leakage. Base aligns with four-year dated payoff ~$7 including cash.

facts.label: Arb II Siembra Minera option
facts.evidence: Arb II RFA pleadings claim large incremental damages; base zero until tribunal path and collectibility clearer. High case is bull-only optionality.

judgments.label: Corporate cash (soft floor)
judgments.evidence: Secondary cash ~USD 100M / 147.9M shares (~$0.68). YE2025 press cited ~USD 69M before later placements. SEDAR annual pending [HUMAN REVIEW].

judgments.label: Legal burn and senior-claim reserve
judgments.evidence: Ongoing litigation spend and ranking risk versus other attached judgment creditors on CITGO proceeds.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

falsifiers: SEDAR cash balance or going-concern burn shows cash floor below the low case after legal spend.
Amber sale closes with de minimis net cash to Gold Reserve after senior creditors, or OFAC/closing permanently blocks distribution.
Tribunal dismisses Arb II or collectibility collapses so high-case optionality is not supportable.
Creditor waterfall or burn rate shows a larger structural haircut than the low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

catalyst_paths.impact: Partial attached-judgment recovery plus residual cash over ~4 years (OFAC/closing/appeals path). Net after CVR 5.466% and bonus plan leakage. No Arb II value in base.
Amber CITGO sale closes with little net cash to Gold Reserve after senior creditors; legal spend continues; cash floor erodes; Arb II worthless near term

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Every currently identified material claim is valued once: cash, risked award recovery, Arb II option, and a realization reserve. Share count and cash await SEDAR confirmation.

valuation.evidence: Secondary cash ~USD 100M / 147.9M shares (~$0.68). YE2025 press cited ~USD 69M before later placements. SEDAR annual pending [HUMAN REVIEW].
valuation.assumption_summary: Present cash available to common after near-term legal/G&A burn; no award receivable booked.
valuation.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: SEDAR cash balance or going-concern burn shows cash floor below the low case after legal spend.

valuation.evidence: Company H1 2025 interim Note 5 unpaid award ~$1.18bn face; Delaware attached judgment / CITGO sale path; net after CVR 5.466% and bonus-plan leakage. Base aligns with four-year dated payoff ~$7 including cash.
valuation.assumption_summary: Risked present value of net award collections only; cash remains separate.
valuation.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Amber sale closes with de minimis net cash to Gold Reserve after senior creditors, or OFAC/closing permanently blocks distribution.

valuation.evidence: Arb II RFA pleadings claim large incremental damages; base zero until tribunal path and collectibility clearer. High case is bull-only optionality.
valuation.assumption_summary: Incremental option only; does not double-count ICSID/CITGO recovery.
valuation.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Tribunal dismisses Arb II or collectibility collapses so high-case optionality is not supportable.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Award is not booked as a probable receivable; GAAP equity understates economic claims. Cash from secondary financials pending SEDAR PDF.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of Gold Reserve Ltd., including corporate cash, risked ICSID/CITGO recovery after CVR/bonus leakage, Arb II optionality, and realization reserves.
economic_claim.unit_source: Aggregator / ADVFN shares outstanding 147,869,033 [HUMAN REVIEW — confirm on SEDAR annual]
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: No operating enterprise. Equity equals cash plus risked legal recoveries less reserves; CVR and bonus leakage are netted inside the risked recovery component.

component_groups.label: Corporate cash (soft floor)
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net cash available to common after near-term burn.
component_groups.adjustments: Liquidity, FX, and placement dilution bracket the range.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key corporate_cash; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Risked ICSID/CITGO net recovery
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risked present value of net award / attached-judgment collections.
component_groups.adjustments: Probability, timing, OFAC/closing, creditor ranking, CVR, and bonus plan are inside the range.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key risked_award_citgo_recovery; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Analyst judgment pending Amber closing and creditor waterfall; base embeds partial recovery over ~4 years.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Base assumes ~4 years to meaningful net cash; bear embeds longer or failed closing.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining legal spend and senior claims are partly in the reserve component and partly netted in recovery.

component_groups.label: Arb II Siembra Minera option
component_groups.valuation_basis: Milestone option on Arb II incremental damages only.
component_groups.adjustments: Base zero; high case is success-path optionality only.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key arb_ii_option; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base success probability treated as ~0 until clearer tribunal path; high case is bull optionality.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Multi-year arbitration timing; not in the four-year base payoff.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No additional owner-funded mine capital modeled; legal spend covered in reserve/cash burn.

component_groups.label: Legal burn and senior-claim reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Reserve for legal burn and senior-claim leakage.
component_groups.adjustments: Negative additive; does not double-count CVR already netted in recovery.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key legal_burn_and_senior_claims_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

wisdom_applied: Klarman: legal recovery is a separate, probability-weighted claim, not booked book value.
Pabrai: base case excludes lottery Arb II until the path is clearer.
limitations: SEDAR financials and exact attached-judgment rank remain [HUMAN REVIEW].
Component base (~$5.7 before reserve) plus cash bridges to the ~$7 four-year dated payoff used for stance-gate IRR.
Starter ranges are analyst estimates pending committee review.

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete component schedule (cash + risked award + Arb II option). Lawrence yield-curve payoff remains the stance-gate IRR bridge, not a second asset stack.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Corporate cash (soft floor)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?
